basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Research Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Assistant Professor / Research Associate posts! Published in May 2026 at the official website of Gujarat University, this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a 1st Class Master’s degree in Management with Human Resource / Finance / Marketing / General Management and related area can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 26-05-2026. Find all details about the Gujarat University Assistant Professor / Research Associate new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notifi

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Management with Human Resource / Finance / Marketing / General Management and related area
qualification.details: Assistant Professor: 1st Class in Master’s degree in Management with Human Resource / Finance / Marketing / General Management and related area (SLET/NET/Ph.D & Minimum 3 Years of Experience is Mandatory) Research Associate: 1st Class in Master’s degree in Management with Human Resource / Finance / Marketing / General Management and related area (SLET/NET/Ph.D & Minimum 1 Years of Experience is Desirable)

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Rs. 60000 Per Month Research Associate: Rs. 50000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gujarat University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 is 26th May 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor and Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by Gujarat University. Out of these, 3 are for the Assistant Professor position and 1 is for the Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st Class Master’s degree in Management with specializations in Human Resource, Finance, Marketing, or General Management and related areas to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor and Research Associate roles?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000, depending on the post and their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, making it accessible to a wider range of eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor and Research Associate posts will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates are required to fill out and submit their applications through the official Gujarat University recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q8. When will the interview for the shortlisted candidates take place?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be held on 01st June 2026. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Assistant Professor and Research Associate at Gujarat University are contractual in nature. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the university's terms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience. You can also visit the official website of Gujarat University.
